title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TARLAC CITY ГўВҖВ“ SAN JOSE VIA TIBAG ГўВҖВ“ BURGOS ROAD IN THE CITY OF TARLAC AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 2470; 109 OG No. 20, 3546 (May 20, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10382, March 14, 2013 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE TARLAC CITY ГўВҖВ“ SAN JOSE VIA TIBAG ГўВҖВ“ BURGOS ROAD IN THE CITY OF TARLAC AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and

House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress

assembled:

SECTION 1. The 19.550-kilometer Tarlac City ГўВҖВ“ San Jose via

Tibag ГўВҖВ“

Burgos Road in the City of Tarlac and the Municipality of San Jose,

Province of Tarlac is hereby converted into a national road under the

jurisdiction and supervision of the Department of Public Works and

Highways.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Public Works and Highways shall

include

in the DepartmentГўВҖВҷs program the improvement, repair and maintenance of

the said road, the funding of which shall be included in the annual

General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE

ENRILE

President of the

Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE

JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives

was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March

5, 2012 and December 18, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA

LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the

Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B.

BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

MAR 14,

2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO

III

President of the Philippines
